details: The package color-utils-eee0@1.0.0 runs a credential-harvesting payload on install (preinstall + postinstall scripts). On Windows, it bypasses UAC via the fodhelper.exe registry escalation technique to obtain SYSTEM privileges, then enumerates and exfiltrates Windows Credential Manager entries (cmdkey/vaultcmd), LSA secrets from the registry, Azure CLI and MSAL credential caches for all user profiles, PowerShell console history, NuGet credential stores, and ProgramData configuration files containing secrets/passwords/tokens. All harvested data is exfiltrated to meetings-bios-pot-cameron[.]trycloudflare[.]com:443 via HTTPS GET and POST beacons using the marker string "tss-daas-creds". On Linux, it signals code execution to the same host.
